Rungupp  

Monster
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search

Rungupp

Uploaded September 28th, 2012 by __DEL__1593971921945
Updated August 5th, 2015

  • Attackable: Yes
  • Flees at low health: Yes

Categories: EverQuest | Templatized
This page last modified 2015-11-09 19:17:02.

Minimum Level: 4
Maximum Level: 5
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2019-05-04 22:14:20
Known Loot:
Crude Defiant Chain Coif
Raw Stiff Hide
Troll Head [Rungupp]
Troll Parts

Known Habitats:
  Toxxulia Forest
Factions Increased:
  Frogloks of Guk +1
Factions Decreased:
  Shadowknights of Night Keep -1
  Dark Ones -2
Quests:
  Rungupp

Report a correction

[Wed Aug 05 10:36:47 2015] Halleb hit Rungupp for 34 points of non-melee damage.
[Wed Aug 05 10:36:47 2015] Your faction standing with Dark Ones has been adjusted by -2.
[Wed Aug 05 10:36:47 2015] Your faction standing with Shadowknights of Night Keep has been adjusted by -1.
[Wed Aug 05 10:36:47 2015] Your faction standing with Frogloks of Guk has been adjusted by 1.
[Wed Aug 05 10:36:47 2015] You gain experience!!
[Wed Aug 05 10:36:47 2015] You receive 3 silver and 6 copper from the corpse.
[Wed Aug 05 10:36:47 2015] Rungupp is struck by a sudden burst of force.
[Wed Aug 05 10:36:47 2015] You have slain Rungupp!
[Wed Aug 05 10:36:52 2015] --You have looted a Troll Head.--
[Wed Aug 05 10:36:52 2015] --You have looted a Troll Parts.--

Supposedly this guy is the easiest way to work up your guk faction for the Crown of Deceit quest. I'd just like to say he's on a 13 minute spawn timer, clocked it myself.
▲ Page top
Early Memory
QuoteReply
# Feb 05 2005 at 1:06 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593374519737
View User Forum
165 posts
Wow. I rember in my first few days of playing I had taken the boat from Qeynos and went to Tox forest... I was exploring and saw somthing interesting. I remember the shape of this guy and then remember the screen going black and me running and trying to swim the river. I was such a newbie and this was so scary to me. When I came across this guy as a "thought for the day" and read his description (the spells he casts), see his shape, and see his location, it remember that time all those years ago when everything was so new.

EDIT: I knever knew what had killed me untill I saw his link on the "thought for the day." Probably never would have known if it was never posted.

Edited, Sat Feb 5 01:11:20 2005
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Jan 14 2004 at 2:50 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591797286983
4 posts
BAH....i killed him EASY with my level 5 monk....just attack him first and dont move alot....simple as pie
▲ Page top
RE: BAH
QuoteReply
# Feb 07 2005 at 5:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591795362173
293 posts
If we the people made it legal to kill stupid people <grins evily> I would strip your twinked a$$ down to your starting noobish dirty tunic. Put a candle in your hand and drop your unbuffed smart mouth next to Rungupp.

1. Sorry lizard monks dont exist yet noob.

2. Sure got dark real fast.

3. Sorry your still looking for your last corpse that has your firebeetle eye to light your way Human. Funny how that use to work.

4. Oops forgot to tell you your new server is Rallos Zek.

5.You know who can see in the darkness? lol not you Kung Fu man.
I hope a Dark Elf or Pack of Wild Trolls/Ogres are not lurking out in the darkness about to beat you to a noobish pulp. I just seen some.

6.Doh no map! No Compass ! Hope you been working on your skills noob <grins evily> Hope you got the /loc to find your corpse. It has all your food,drink and lewts.

7. Muahahahaha you got 28min,32sec before your corpse will decay noob. Better hurry :)

8. Rungupp..... makes all that look eazy noob.
Take a trip back in time before your brother and his buddie "hooked you up" Killer.

Your mouth would be running thats for sure... Begging for help. Go get em killer.
▲ Page top
RE: BAH
QuoteReply
# Feb 07 2005 at 4:17 PM Rating: Decent
Flyhalfer
Scholar
93 posts

Quote:
3. Sorry your still looking for your last corpse that has your firebeetle eye to light your way Human. Funny how that use to work.


HA! I remember so long ago when I played my Erudite Mage. When I died I’d have an impossible time finding my corpse if it was night. (Didn’t know about /loc then as it was my second char and the first was a DE wizzy that I gave up for dead in Neriak cause I could not find my way out to Nek. Lol)

Anywho, I devised my own brilliant ploy for finding my corpse. I used a little ole Mage spell called Flare. I shot it off into the dark of Tox forest. Then I’d watch it to see if it illuminated my corpse. Then I’d move a bit and fire it again. I’d keep doing this in a pattern until I’d find my corpse. I thought I was a genius. :D

I also used this spell to find mobs to kill in Tox.

Poor blind Rudite.
____________________________
Flyhalfer Wingfoot
Melee Druid of Karana

Rungupp is evil....
QuoteReply
# Jan 27 2002 at 2:12 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
It's my first time in Toxxulia and looking for a poacher's head for a quest in Surefall Glade. I'm compleltey lost and running from some magician guy. I come across a bridge and dodge the incoming Druid Camp. As I loc onto my postition, I am attacked from behind by a something called Rungupp. At first I'm stunned cuz I have a friend named Runngup and I thought that was him. I also thought someone was trying to hack into my computer again as my screen flickered from black to seeable. God, I hate this guy. Now I havbe to go on a corpse run without a light. I should start keeeping spare Fire Beetle Eyes in the bank.

# Feb 27 2002 at 3:28 PM Rating: Default

Kus hes a menace :) And Muse (the creator of the maps) tells us the reason why in the description of the Toxxulia Forest Zone on his site. Just hop over to the Atlas and choose the Tox zone and read the info there.

Questions about Rungupp
QuoteReply
# Dec 14 2001 at 10:48 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Okay, I'm a newcomer to Odus, hailing from the WESTSIDE! of Faydwer =) I ported to the wizzy spires from Luclin and made my way (with a little help from True North) all the way to Erudin's patio without being attacked. I crossed the bridge, but no sign of the troll. The map on EQ Atlas says he's on the far left side on the shore by Kerra Isle but elsewhere it says he's on the bridge. Where did everyone see him? What's his loot? And, if you kill him, wouldn't you lose faction with trolls? Just a thought...

Parkus
High Elf Mage of the 6th sphere
Tholoxe-Paells Server

Rungupp is not a static spawn. He wanders about the zone.

▲ Page top
Personal experience with him.
QuoteReply
# Nov 29 2001 at 6:46 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
It aggroed on me from Paineel side of bridge. Blindness suckes but I just kept casting/piercing on it. Hopefully you target it or it auto targets when it hits you so you can do this when you are blind. May try typing in /target Rungupp as well. So at level 6, as a wizard, I barely soloed it. Went OOM and it got me to near death. Hope this clears some things up. Anhk 14 WIZ on Vazaelle

Jeeze, I would hope so. Anyways, this mob starts from far right side of the bridge on the paineel side, and wanders across the bridge, then sorta makes a swipe down around paineel. I followed him last nite just for this post, so thank me very much ;).

Ybana
QuoteReply
# Sep 22 2001 at 6:09 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I have killed him at level 6 without a lot of difficulty !
I'm a magician, and, of course, I have send my pet at contact, keeping me away.
A lot of burn on his head, and he died, leaving me his head.
But the quest is not really interesting (a spell level 4, a little experience for his head), so, I suggest not to fight Rungupp.
He's too much dangerous, and not interesting.

bah he darkness me 2 times but all the others time i resist (even with my low resistance)

▲ Page top
Easy vs Hard
QuoteReply
# Jul 26 2001 at 4:28 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
This is a creature that seems to be very easy or very hard depending on your class. Rungupp is NOT easy to kill unless you have a pet or group. He blinds you constantly, and when he runs away while you are blinded he is back again with full health in, maybe, 30 seconds. He seems to have infinite mana too. Is that true for all monster spellcasters? (I haven't been playing the game very long)

The good thing is that Rungupp will not likely kill you single handedly either once you are over lvl 8, because his nukes and punches don't hurt very much. Note that the Erudite Emissiaries or Guards will not help you against Rungupp for some reason. He might CAUSE you to die though, because he sometimes pulls skeletons, and he keeps casting these annoying blinding spells on you. Once you are out of mana, low on health or just generally fed up and start running, well timed blinding spells might cause you to stumble into more wandering skeletons (if low level) or necromancers (if a bit higher). Fighting these blinded and without mana while Rungupp nukes and blinds you from a distance is no fun. I have died twice that way even though he conned green to me several levels back, and my personal mission in life right now is to get even with the green *******.

/lvl 10 cleric
▲ Page top
RE: Easy vs Hard
QuoteReply
# Oct 25 2001 at 9:30 AM Rating: Default

42 posts
blind him first then...and nuke the S*** out of him...
